title: Marketplace Manager - FurnitureMart - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - FurnitureMart - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Join the FurnitureMart family as a Marketplace Manager in Bengaluru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About FurnitureMart:
FurnitureMart is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FurnitureMart!
